name: Almaden Minerals Ltd.
description: Almaden Minerals Ltd. is a Canada-based exploration stage company. The Company is engaged in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties. Its principal asset is the Ixtaca precious metals project in Puebla State, Mexico, which was discovered by the Company in 2010. The Ixtaca project is a gold-silver deposit, and the Company has historically focused on advancing this project through environmental permitting and engineering phases.
